{# _custom_fields.html — "Additional details" key:value pairs for a vendor card. Mirrors customers/_custom_fields.html; all mutations HTMX-swap this container outerHTML. Receives: vendor (VendorCard). Called by: vendors/overview_tab.html, htmx_views.py vendor_add/delete_custom_field. Depends on: htmx_views.py vendor custom-field routes. #} {% set _post_url = '/v2/partials/vendors/' ~ vendor.id ~ '/custom-fields' %} {% set _del_base = '/v2/partials/vendors/' ~ vendor.id ~ '/custom-fields/' %}
{# Existing label:value rows #} {% set cf = vendor.custom_fields or {} %} {% if cf %}
{% for label, value in cf.items() %}
{{ label }}
{{ value }}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %} {# Add field affordance — Alpine open/close #}
